newTests.name: opens Playwright WebSocket without accessKey when empty (still no ReferenceError)
builds Create Session WebSocket URL with accessKey (not a free variable)
shows accessKey in Playwright curl snippet when status provides it
includes accessKey in options and snippet query when provided
builds Create Session WebSocket URL without accessKey when omitted
opens Playwright WebSocket with accessKey and does not throw ReferenceError
omits accessKey from options when empty
